title: Fleet service registry
description: Single source of truth for the 50+ service fleet (host->service map). Consumed by D3 CI, D4 template, D5 observability, D7 tiering. Stores ONLY secret references, never plaintext DSNs.

id.description: Unique service id (kebab-case). Also the ACR image name.

host.description: SSH alias (~/.ssh/config) of the deploy target host.

deploy_dir.description: Absolute path on the host. (host, deploy_dir) must be unique.

port.description: Published host port. Must be unique across the fleet.

sentry_dsn_secret.description: Name of the secret/env var holding the DSN (e.g. SENTRY_DSN_FOO). NEVER the DSN itself.

monitor_slug.description: cron services only (optional): GlitchTip cron monitor slug, unique across the fleet. Long-running services use Uptime Kuma liveness probes instead and omit this.

heartbeat_url_secret.description: cron services only: NAME of the secret/env var holding the GlitchTip Heartbeat check-in URL (e.g. ZLX_HEARTBEAT_URL_FOO). NEVER the URL itself. Injected at runtime via ZLX_HEARTBEAT_URL. GlitchTip 6.2 cron dead-man's-switch requires Heartbeat, not capture_checkin.

tier.description: Environment / blast-radius tier (D7). staging only for services with real blast radius.

rollback_safety.description: Whether redeploying the previous image tag is safe. unsafe = irreversible side-effects (e.g. forward-only DB migration).

healthcheck_url.description: Optional post-deploy health probe URL (overrides default). Used by pull_and_deploy.sh rollback gate.
